finding_results.notes: Timestamp anchors are preserved, but repeated clock-stamp paragraph openings were broken with action/sensory-led transitions (burner buzz, incoming call, vendor arrival). The revised clusters avoid runs longer than two explicit time-led openings.

Failed-contact beats now use distinct mechanics: ringout drop, full voicemail, wrong-party pickup/hang-up, stalled pending delivery timeout, and relay error-tone disconnect. Exact "There was no answer" phrasing was removed.

summary: Applied targeted prose/copyedit revisions to resolve all packet findings while preserving chapter continuity, voice signatures, and high-pressure register. Timekeeping remains legible without mechanical timestamp templating, and communication failures now escalate through varied failure modes tied to scene pressure.
